effects_provenance.raw: Creme Brulee THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Creme Brulee THCA Flower is a dessert-rich indica-leaning hybrid that lives up to its decadent namesake. The cultivar produces dense, well-structured buds with a rich aromatic profile blending vanilla custard, caramelized sugar, and a light dusting of warm spice — bag appeal first with serious dessert-forward flavor character. Effects Creme Brulee delivers a comfortable, indica-leaning experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with deep body relaxation. The high lands steadily and lasts — suitable for late-afternoon use, evening unwinding, or settling in with flavor character intact. A reliable flavor-led cultivar. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: smooth vanilla custard up front, with caramelized sugar through the middle and a warm light-spice finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably dessert-rich. The terpene profile reads vanilla-and-caramel — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Creme Brulee harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Creme Brulee THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Creme Brulee THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. indica Spice Sugar Vanilla THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Purple Haze THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Purple Haze THCa Flower Purple Haze THCa Flower is a legendary sativa-dominant hybrid known for its energetic cerebral effects, nostalgic roots, and unmistakable sweet berry spice profile. Descended from Purple Thai and Haze genetics, this iconic strain became world-famous during the psychedelic era of the 1960s and remains a favorite among creative daytime smokers. With bright fruity flavor, uplifting energy, and nearly 30% THCa, Purple Haze delivers a classic sativa experience that still stands the test of time. Purple Haze THCa Flower Highlights Type : Sativa-Dominant Hybrid (85% Sativa / 15% Indica) Parent Strains : Purple Thai × Haze Flavors : Berry, fruity grape, sweet spice Aroma : Blueberry, earthy fruit, spicy sweetness Terpenes : Limonene, Myrcene, Humulene, Linalool THCa : 29.82% Effects : Euphoric, sociable, energetic, creatively uplifting Usage : Ideal for daytime sessions and creative activities What is Purple Haze THCa Flower? Purple Haze is one of the most iconic cannabis strains ever created. Popularized by Jimi Hendrix’s legendary 1967 song, this sativa-forward hybrid became a symbol of the psychedelic era thanks to its dreamy cerebral effects and vibrant personality. Created from Purple Thai and Haze genetics, Purple Haze combines sweet berry flavor with earthy spice and a bright energetic high that makes it a staple among classic sativa lovers. Purple Haze THCa Effects Purple Haze delivers a fast-moving cerebral lift that promotes positivity, creativity, and social energy. The experience stays mentally active while maintaining a smooth and manageable body buzz. Strong euphoric uplift Creative inspiration and mental stimulation Sociable and energetic mood Light warm body sensation without heaviness Purple Haze Cannabinoids THCa : 29.82% Δ9-THC : 0.261% Total Cannabinoids : 32.010% Purple Haze Terpenes Limonene : Bright citrus character with uplifting energy Myrcene : Adds smooth herbal depth and body balance Humulene : Earthy and woody with grounding support Linalool : Floral sweetness with calming undertones How to Use Purple Haze THCa Flower Purple Haze is best enjoyed during the daytime through smoking or dry herb vaporizing. Its terpene-rich profile delivers the most flavor when stored properly in a cool, airtight container away from heat and sunlight. Why Choose Hemp Hop for Purple Haze THCa Flower Premium indoor or greenhous

effects_provenance.raw: Bacio Gelato - THCA BULK Flower - Greenhouse 1 POUND Bacio Gelato - Silky, Dessert-Like Indica Hybrid Bacio Gelato is an indica-dominant hybrid that balances calming depth with a smooth, uplifting edge; the experience is refined and approachable, settling into a relaxed, creative haze. Dense, frosted buds display deep purple undertones and vibrant orange pistils, finished with a sugar-like trichome coating that catches the light. Aromas of sweet cream, fresh berries, and a hint of citrus unfold into a flavor profile of buttery gelato, berry jam, and a soft herbal finish, offering a premium, natural tasting experience. Terpene Profile The aroma and overall character of Bacio Gelato are shaped by a harmonious terpene blend: Myrcene : Provides a mellow, herbaceous base that conveys a smooth, sedative-like warmth. Limonene : Lifts the profile with bright citrus notes and a cleansing, refreshing edge. Caryophyllene : Adds a spicy, peppery undertone that rounds out the sweetness with depth. Effects Bacio Gelato delivers a layered sensation: an initial calm clarity that eases into gentle physical relaxation, while creative focus and sociable ease remain intact. The overall effect feels polished and comforting—ideal for winding down without losing a thoughtful, present mindset. Flower Gold Canna

effects_provenance.raw: MAC1 THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is MAC1 THCa Flower Strain? MAC1 THCa Flower Strain , often hailed as "The MAC," emerges as a standout hybrid in the cannabis world, resulting from the sophisticated cross of Alien Cookies F2 with Miracle 15. This strain is not just renowned for its striking aesthetic but also for delivering a harmonious blend of uplifting and soothing effects, making it a versatile choice for any time of the day. MAC1 Terpenes The terpene profile of MAC1 is as unique as its cultivation: Limonene Caryophyllene Pinene These terpenes combine to create MAC1's signature smooth, creamy, and slightly funky aroma, making each session a delight to the senses. MAC1 Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 30.17% Total Cannabinoids: 31.14% D9-THC: 0.18% MAC1 THCA Strain Effects MAC1, with its meticulously curated genetics, delivers an experience that's both uplifting and grounding. Users often report a surge of creative energy and euphoria that sparks lively conversations and imaginative thoughts, perfect for social or artistic endeavors. As the high progresses, it smoothly transitions into a gentle relaxation that spreads throughout the body, offering a balanced effect that doesn't tether you to the couch but instead allows for a pleasant, flexible chill. This makes MAC1 an exemplary strain for those seeking to enhance their day or unwind in the evening without feeling overly sedated. effects_provenance.raw: Double Stuffed - THCA Flower - Greenhouse Top Cut 14 GRAMS Double Stuffed – Indica-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain Double Stuffed is an indica-dominant hybrid known for its rich, creamy aroma with sweet vanilla and nutty undertones. This strain delivers a flavorful experience paired with deeply relaxing and mood-enhancing effects. Type: Indica-Dominant Hybrid Cannabis Strain for Relaxation and Comfort As an indica-dominant hybrid, Double Stuffed offers soothing physical relaxation alongside a gentle cerebral uplift. It is perfect for easing stress and promoting calm while maintaining mental alertness. Double Stuffed Terpene Profile – Creamy, Sweet, and Nutty Aromas The primary terpenes are: Myrcene: Earthy and musky notes that encourage relaxation and relief from tension. Caryophyllene: Spicy and peppery scent contributing to calming and anti-inflammatory properties. Limonene: Citrus hints that support mood elevation and anxiety reduction. Linalool: Floral and lavender undertones that enhance tranquility and stress relief. These terpenes combine to create Double Stuffed’s signature creamy and sweet aroma, accented by nutty and floral notes. Effects of Double Stuffed – Deep Body Relaxation with Gentle Mental Uplift Double Stuffed induces a calming body high that relieves physical tension and discomfort, paired with a mild cerebral boost that enhances mood without causing sedation. This makes it an excellent choice for evening relaxation or unwinding after a long day. Experience the smooth flavor and relaxing effects of Double Stuffed — an indica-dominant hybrid designed to soothe your body and uplift your mind. effects_provenance.raw: Ztarburst THCa Weight: 14g Ztarburst THCa tests at 30.60% THCa, putting it in a high-potency range with a balanced hybrid feel and a sweet, candy-forward character. The effects open with a quick lift through the head that brightens the mood and adds a clear, upbeat edge right away. As it builds, that initial burst settles into a smoother body calm that takes the tension out without dropping the experience too hard too fast. By the finish, it lands in a relaxed, steady place that feels full-bodied, easy, and well-rounded. It’s the perfect strain for late afternoon sessions, easing out of the workday, or kicking back when you want a strong hybrid that starts lively and settles comfortably. 30.60% total THCa 30.65% total cannabinoids Hybrid / Anytime strain Greenhouse Grown Farm bill compliant (below .3% delta-9 THC) Certificate of Analysis (COA) [vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1575559006742{padding-top: 35px !important;}” mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_gradient_switch=”no” row_reverse_mobile=”0′′ row_reverse_tablet=”0′′ woodmart_disable_overflow=”0′′ el_id=”more”][vc_column width=”2/3′′ css=”.vc_custom_1575559577606{margin-bottom: 4vh !important;padding-top: 0px !important;}” offset=”vc_col-sm-offset-2′′ mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_sticky_column=”false” parallax_scroll=”no” mobile_reset_margin=”no” tablet_reset_margin=”no”] Ztarburst THCa [vc_tta_accordion style=”flat” color=”black” c_icon=”chevron” c_position=”right” active_section=”1′′][vc_tta_section title=”Visual” tab_id=”visual”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]Ztarburst THCa has medium sized buds with a chunky, slightly elongated structure and a hand-trimmed finish. effects_provenance.raw: Octane Mintz 28g (1 oz) Octane Mintz is a potent indica-dominant strain (70% indica, 30% sativa) born from the flavorful cross of Sunset Octane and Wedding Cake. This strain boasts a rich aroma profile that combines the earthy, diesel notes of Sunset Octane with the sweet, vanilla undertones of Wedding Cake. The result is a deeply relaxing and euphoric high that envelops the mind and body, making it an excellent choice for unwinding after a long day. The effects come on strong, providing a sense of calm and contentment while also stimulating the appetite, often leading to a satisfying case of the munchies. Beyond its recreational appeal, Octane Mintz is also favored for its therapeutic benefits. Its high potency makes it effective for alleviating symptoms of pain, stress, and insomnia. The strain's relaxing nature can help ease tension and promote restful sleep, while its mood-enhancing effects can provide relief from anxiety and stress. Whether you're looking to relax, relieve pain, or simply enjoy a peaceful evening, Octane Mintz offers a well-rounded experience that caters to both the body and mind. Flower Type 1 Flow Gardens

lineage_provenance.raw: octane mintz 28g (1 oz) octane mintz is a potent indica dominant strain (70% indica 30% sativa) born from the flavorful cross of sunset octane and wedding cake. this strain boasts a rich aroma profile that combines the earthy diesel notes of sunset octane with the sweet vanilla undertones of wedding cake. the result is a deeply relaxing and euphoric high that envelops the mind and body making it an excellent choice for unwinding after a long day. the effects come on strong providing a sense of calm and contentment while also stimulating the appetite often leading to a satisfying case of the munchies. beyond its recreational appeal octane mintz is also favored for its therapeutic benefits. its high potency makes it effective for alleviating symptoms of pain stress and insomnia. the strain's relaxing nature can help ease tension and promote restful sleep while its mood enhancing effects can provide relief from anxiety and stress. whether you're looking to relax relieve pain or simply enjoy a peaceful evening octane mintz offers a well rounded experience that caters to both the body and mind. flower type 1 flow gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Sherbert THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Sherbert THCA Flower is an indica-leaning hybrid in the iconic Sunset Sherbert family. The cultivar produces dense, deeply colored buds with a creamy dessert-forward aromatic profile blending bright citrus, sweet fruit, and rich vanilla cream — signature Cookies-line character. Effects Sherbert delivers a comfortable, indica-leaning experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with relaxing body effects. The high lands steadily and lasts — suitable for late-afternoon use, evening unwinding, or settling in with flavor character intact. A reliable Sherbert-family cultivar. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: bright citrus up front, with sweet fruit through the middle and a creamy dessert finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably dessert-rich. The terpene profile reads citrus-and-cream — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Sherbert harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Sherbert THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Sherbert THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. lineage_provenance.raw: sherbert thca flower essential 28g strain profile sherbert thca flower is an indica leaning hybrid in the iconic sunset sherbert family. the cultivar produces dense deeply colored buds with a creamy dessert forward aromatic profile blending bright citrus sweet fruit and rich vanilla cream — signature cookies line character. effects sherbert delivers a comfortable indica leaning experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with relaxing body effects. the high lands steadily and lasts — suitable for late afternoon use evening unwinding or settling in with flavor character intact. a reliable sherbert family cultivar. flavor & aroma on the palate bright citrus up front with sweet fruit through the middle and a creamy dessert finish on the exhale. smoke is silky and unmistakably dessert rich. the terpene profile reads citrus and cream — see the coa for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. lab tested — view the coa every sherbert harvest is third party tested for cannabinoid content terpenes residual solvents pesticides and heavy metals. download the sherbert thca flower certificate of analysis for full test results. tiers explained our three quality tiers are supreme — hand selected top shelf buds with the densest structure highest trichome coverage and strongest terpene expression. preferred — premium grade flower at a balanced price using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. essential — our value tier using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. federally compliant hemp lit farms sherbert thca flower is hemp derived and federally compliant under the 2018 farm bill — containing less than 0.3% δ9 thc by dry weight at harvest. must be 21+ to purchase. not for sale in jurisdictions where thca flower is restricted. explore our full thca flower collection for more strains. citrus fruit indica sweet thca flower lost in translation
